## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Q1 growth initiatives and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**"App Access" Campaign:** Prioritizing a new content cluster to own the emerging "app access" SEO space, using "provisioning" as a high-volume keyword bridge.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**ROI Calculator:** GrowthX will scope the calculator build as a lead-gen tool, with Siit's designer creating the initial brief to ensure new brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Website Relaunch:** The Feb 2026 relaunch requires an SEO plan to protect rankings; GrowthX will provide guidance and Kyle will be available for support.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**New CTA Strategy:** Testing softer CTAs (newsletter, calculator) on tool pages to warm up cold traffic before pushing for a demo.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)

## Topics

### Website Relaunch & SEO

  - [**Timeline:** Targeting early February 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Concern:** Protecting SEO rankings during the migration, which involves new pages and 301 redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide best practices. Kyle (GrowthX) is available for deep-dive support.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### "App Access" Content Campaign

  - [**Strategy:** Own the emerging "app access" SEO space by building a content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Keyword Bridge:** Use "provisioning" as a high-volume keyword, as it's interchangeable with Siit's "app access" concept.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Cluster Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Requests & Approvals:** How-to guides, compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [**Provisioning:** Workflows, automated access.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [**Lifecycle Changes:** Refreshing content on onboarding, role changes, off-boarding.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [**Governance:** Real-time access governance, monitoring, audit trails.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Shadow IT:** Positioning provisioning automation as the solution.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - **Early Wins:** A new article already ranks \#1 for "automated app access" and appears in AI overviews, validating the strategy.
  - [**Cadence:** Skew content production toward this cluster (e.g., 3:2 ratio) while maintaining other topics.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [**Research:** Siit to provide sales call recordings and internal briefings to inform content positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### ROI Calculator

  - [**Goal:** A lead-gen tool on a dedicated landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [**Lead Capture Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Decision:** A hybrid model where users perform a calculation and then provide an email to receive a detailed report.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
      - [**Open Question:** How to capture and store this data for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [**Design Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
      - [Siit's designer will create the initial brief to ensure new brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [GrowthX will then scope the full design and development.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [**Action:** Siit to refine the calculator's logic and data inputs to aid GrowthX's scoping.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### CTA Strategy & Landing Pages

  - [**Problem:** The "Request a Demo" CTA on tool pages is a high-friction jump for cold traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [**Solution:** Test softer, mid-funnel CTAs to warm up users.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
      - [**ROI Calculator:** A strong candidate for a mid-funnel CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [**Newsletter:** A potential CTA, but the current footer form is filled with spam.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
          - [**Action:** GrowthX to research bot prevention (e.g., CAPTCHA) to make this viable.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [**Custom Landing Pages:** GrowthX will scope building custom landing pages for tool pages (e.g., Discord) to provide a more relevant, lower-friction next step than a demo.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

      - [Enrich the "app access" keyword cluster with "provisioning" terms.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [Scope the ROI calculator build (design & dev).](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [Research best practices for ROI calculator data capture.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [Scope building custom landing pages for tool pages.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [Research bot prevention for the newsletter signup form.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [**Siit:**](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Provide sales call recordings and internal briefings on "app access."](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Refine the ROI calculator's logic and data inputs.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [Consult with engineers on ROI calculator data capture.](https://fathom.video/share/jgz-SRNRzyR72PaSmGAX1PD9KrAAHGLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
